summary: Iteration 16 - Testing Class Mode transitions, Spotify playlist import, and HomeView features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: login, home page with Novedades and Spotify CTA, class mode with transitions and playback, playlists page.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with admin@fitbeats.com / Admin123!
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: GET /api/spotify/playlists returns 401 when Spotify not connected (CORRECT behavior)
Backend: POST /api/spotify/playlists/{id}/import returns 401 when Spotify not connected (CORRECT behavior)
Backend: GET /api/spotify/search works (uses client credentials)
Backend: GET /api/class-sessions returns sessions list
Backend: POST /api/class-sessions creates new session
Backend: PUT /api/class-sessions/{id} updates session
Backend: DELETE /api/class-sessions/{id} deletes session
Backend: GET /api/mixes returns mixes list
Backend: GET /api/albums returns albums list
Frontend: Login redirects to / (HomeView)
Frontend: Home page shows 'Novedades' section with albums
Frontend: Home page shows 'Conecta tu Spotify' banner (data-testid=spotify-connect-cta)
Frontend: Clicking 'Conectar' button navigates to /profile
Frontend: Modo Clase page loads with 'Nueva clase' button
Frontend: Class editor opens when creating new class
Frontend: Add songs dialog shows mixes with 'Agregar' buttons
Frontend: Tracks can be added to class session
Frontend: Transition dropdown shows options (Crossfade, Corte, Fade Out, Fade In)
Frontend: Transition can be changed (verified crossfade -> fade_out)
Frontend: Duration input is visible and editable
Frontend: Class session can be saved
Frontend: Starting class plays first track
Frontend: Class progress bar advances during playback (0:03 -> 0:07)
Frontend: Stop button visible during class playback
Frontend: Class can be stopped
Frontend: Playlists page loads
critical_code_review_comments: ClassModeView.js: advancingRef guard (line 64) correctly prevents double-advance race condition during transitions
ClassModeView.js: performTransition (lines 235-298) properly implements volume fading with setTimeout delays for audio loading
ClassModeView.js: uri is correctly propagated in all playMix calls for Spotify tracks
HomeView.js: Spotify playlist import section only shows when spotify.spotifyConnected is true (correct conditional rendering)
HomeView.js: Spotify connect CTA banner shows when not connected with proper data-testid
server.py: GET /api/spotify/playlists correctly returns 401 when user has no Spotify token
server.py: POST /api/spotify/playlists/{id}/import correctly returns 401 when not connected

test_credentials.note: Admin user does NOT have Spotify connected - this is expected

seed_data_creation: Created test class session 'Test Class Session' with 2 tracks for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified: 1) Class mode transitions - advancingRef prevents double-advance, transition dropdowns work (Crossfade/Corte/Fade Out/Fade In), duration inputs work. 2) Class playback - starts correctly, progress bar advances, stop works. 3) HomeView - shows Novedades with albums, Spotify CTA banner when not connected, clicking Conectar navigates to /profile. 4) Spotify endpoints - correctly return 401 when user not connected (admin test user has no Spotify). Note: To test actual Spotify playlist import, need a user with Spotify Premium connected.

features_verified.class_mode_transitions: WORKING - dropdown shows Crossfade/Corte/Fade Out/Fade In, can change transitions
features_verified.class_mode_playback: WORKING - starts first track, progress bar advances, stop works
features_verified.class_mode_duration: WORKING - duration inputs visible and editable
features_verified.home_spotify_cta: WORKING - shows 'Conecta tu Spotify' banner when not connected
features_verified.spotify_playlists_endpoint: WORKING - returns 401 when not connected (correct behavior)
features_verified.spotify_import_endpoint: WORKING - returns 401 when not connected (correct behavior)

notes.spotify_testing_limitation: Admin test user does NOT have Spotify connected. The Spotify playlist import feature can only be fully tested with a user who has connected their Spotify Premium account. The 401 responses are CORRECT behavior for unconnected users.
notes.transition_testing: Transitions were verified to be selectable in the UI. Full transition audio testing (actual crossfade/fade effects) requires longer playback observation or manual testing.
